title: Display apparatus
abstract: A display apparatus including a main display area, a component area, and a peripheral area, the display apparatus includes: a substrate; an auxiliary sub-pixel arranged in the component area on the substrate; an auxiliary pixel circuit arranged in the peripheral area on the substrate; a connection line connecting the auxiliary sub-pixel to the auxiliary pixel circuit; an auxiliary scan line arranged in the peripheral area on the substrate and connected to the auxiliary pixel circuit; and an auxiliary scan driving circuit arranged in the peripheral area on the substrate and configured to output a scan signal to the auxiliary pixel circuit through the auxiliary scan line.
claims: 1. A display apparatus comprising: a first pixel electrode disposed in a first display area; a second pixel electrode disposed in a second display area which includes a transmission area; a first pixel circuit connected to the first pixel electrode; a second pixel circuit connected to the second pixel electrode; and a light blocking layer disposed in the second display area, wherein the first pixel electrode overlaps at least a portion of the first pixel circuit and the second pixel electrode does not overlap the second pixel circuit in a plan view, and wherein the light blocking layer is disposed between the second pixel electrode and a substrate to overlap the second pixel electrode and not to overlap the second pixel circuit in a plan view.
